lighting.shadow_character: Short, intense, and clearly defined, replicating the subject's shape.

color.similar_film_stock: Kodak Ektar 100 or Fuji Velvia (digital reinterpretation)

texture.detail_rendering: Hard light effectively emphasizes the texture and contours of the subjects.

improvement_notes: For a more luxurious feel, use soft diffused light (large softbox), a neutral or pastel background instead of magenta, and a more organized composition like a grid or a minimalist hero shot.
nano_banana_prompt: A top-down flat lay photo of [YOUR FOOD HERE], scattered artfully on a solid, vibrant hot pink background. The lighting is a single hard light source from the top-left, creating sharp, crisp shadows and high contrast, giving a graphic and poppy look. The colors are hyper-saturated and vivid. Shot with a macro lens, ultra-sharp detail, deep depth of field, clean commercial studio quality. Energetic, playful, and modern food photography style, reminiscent of Bon Appétit magazine. --ar 2:3 --style raw
